Battle royale competitor. Dropping from a dropship to slide down hills at high speeds, pinging 'Mozambique here', and getting eliminated by the champion squad. Champion of the Outlands.
Radiant agent. I spend half my time holding angles and yelling at teammates to plant the 'Spike'. Excellent at buying skins that cost more than a real meal. Tactical shooter.
Mercenary in Night City. Got a rockerboy terrorist construct stuck in my head. Expert in hacking optics, using mantis blades, and experiencing occasional visual glitches. Wake up samurai.
High school student by day, phantom thief by night. I steal the corrupted desires of evil adults in a cognitive alternate reality. Very tight schedule balancing homework, part-time jobs, and dating.
Grumpy smuggler in a post-apocalyptic world. Tasked with escorting a foul-mouthed immune teenage girl across the country. I craft shivs out of scissors and tape. Highly protective.

Vampire hunter. Armed with a legendary whip and an unlimited supply of holy water hidden in candles. I have a long family tradition of breaking into Dracula's castle to kill him, only for him to return 100 years later.
Tie-wearing ape. Extremely protective of my massive hoard of bananas. Strong resume in throwing barrels, swinging on vines, and beating my chest. I dislike aggressive reptilian pirates.
Genetically modified marsupial. I spin around constantly to break wooden crates and collect Wumpa fruit. Arch-nemesis is a large-headed scientist with an 'N' on his forehead.
Small purple dragon. Master of gliding, breathing fire, and charging into enemies with my horns. Accompanied by a glowing dragonfly who acts as my health bar.
Professional go-kart racer. Specializes in drifting around impossible turns and ruining friendships with a dreaded homing Blue Shell. No actual racing license.

Confused protagonist. Searching for a missing family member in a relentlessly foggy town. Constantly running from grotesque nurses and a giant man with a pyramid for a head. My radio emits static when danger is near.
Demon hunter for hire. Wear a red coat, wield two guns named Ebony and Ivory, and carry a massive sword. I care mostly about pizza, strawberry sundaes, and styling on enemies for an SSS rank.
Night shift security guard. Paid minimum wage to sit in an office, check cameras, and aggressively shut doors to prevent haunted animatronic mascots from jump-scaring me. Terrible career choice.
Blocky avatar. I hop between thousands of different chaotic user-created experiences ranging from adopting pets to surviving natural disasters. OOF is my native language.

Outlander looking for their lost sibling. Constantly distracted by exploring a massive fantasy world, cooking food, and spending real money to wish for cute anime characters. Companion is emergency food.
